description_long: This cabinetry ensemble is a modern L-shaped kitchen unit featuring a combination of tall, base, and wall cabinets. The left section includes a tall pantry cabinet with integrated appliances such as a refrigerator and oven, while the central area features a countertop with a built-in cooktop and under-counter drawers. The right section extends into a perpendicular counter with a sink and additional storage below. Upper cabinets provide closed storage and open shelving, with a mix of solid and glass-front doors. The cabinetry is finished in neutral tones, with a blend of matte and wood-textured surfaces, and features minimalist handles. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with integrated appliances, upper and lower storage, and a mix of closed and open shelving in neutral finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, integrated appliances, cooktop, sink, and a mix of upper and lower cabinets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the upper and lower cabinets and the perpendicular counter extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the cabinetry and the arrangement of the tall pantry and refrigerator section.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the L-shaped footprint, countertop surfaces, and spatial relationship between the two main cabinet runs.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite with tall pantry, base cabinets, and wall cabinets
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, drawers, and open shelf
